sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Rio Tinto shares jump as copper beats guidance, iron ore rebounds
feed.summary: Rio Tinto's shares rose over 4% after the miner exceeded its copper production guidance for 2025 and reported stronger-than-expected iron ore shipments in Q4, easing concerns about operational disruptions. The company's annual copper output reached 883,000 tonnes, surpassing its guidance, while Pilbara iron ore shipments hit a record 91.3 million tonnes in the fourth quarter. These results were bolstered by the completion of the Oyu Tolgoi underground mine and recovery from earlier cyclone-related iron ore losses.

feed.title: Toll Brothers Named #1 Home Builder on Fortune Magazine’s 2026 World’s Most Admired Companies® List
feed.summary: Toll Brothers has been recognized as the #1 Home Builder on Fortune magazine's 2026 World's Most Admired Companies list for the ninth time. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to excellence and innovation over nearly 60 years. The honor is based on a survey of executives, directors, and analysts evaluating various criteria like investment value, quality of management, and social responsibility.

feed.title: Jeffrey Bluestone Sells 5,000 Shares of Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) Stock
feed.summary: Jeffrey Bluestone, a director at Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD), sold 5,000 shares of the company's stock on January 20th for a total of $617,500. This transaction reduced his holding by 35.92% to 8,920 shares. The biopharmaceutical company also recorded a 4.0% increase in stock price on Wednesday, reaching $129.11, and reported strong earnings in October, surpassing analyst estimates.

feed.title: STB rules application for Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern merger is incomplete
feed.summary: The Surface Transportation Board (STB) has declared the merger application for Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern incomplete. This decision potentially delays the proposed consolidation of the two major railway companies. The article, published in Biodiesel Magazine, did not provide details on why the application was deemed incomplete.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical's da Vinci 5 Approval Boosts Long-Term Outlook
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical's da Vinci 5 system, approved in 2024, is expected to enhance market penetration and revenue growth over the next five years, despite increased competition from Medtronic. The company benefits from high switching costs due to its established installed base, and analysts project a significant stock price increase. The robotic surgery market remains underpenetrated, offering further growth opportunities for Intuitive Surgical alongside its competitors.

feed.title: Saul Centers, Inc. Announces Tax Treatment of 2025 Dividends
feed.summary: Saul Centers, Inc., an equity REIT, has announced the income tax treatment for its 2025 dividends. For common stock shareholders, 26.3% of the dividends are characterized as ordinary income and 73.7% as return of capital, totaling $2.36 per common share. All preferred stock dividends for 2025 are characterized as ordinary income.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Maintains Quarterly Dividend at $0.165 Per S
feed.summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.165 per share, resulting in a forward yield of 0.85%. This decision comes as the company continues strategic expansion through acquisitions, such as the J. Kevin Campbell Agency assets, despite a recent rating adjustment to Market Perform by BMO due to anticipated softer organic growth. The diversified insurance provider shows robust financial performance with strong margins and revenue growth, though its Altman Z-Score suggests potential financial distress, warranting careful consideration by investors.

feed.title: Why Is TMC Stock Rallying Today?
feed.summary: The Metals Company (TMC) stock rallied after the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) updated regulations for deep-sea explorations, streamlining the permitting process for U.S. companies. TMC announced its intention to use the new consolidated application process, which is expected to reduce the time needed to secure commercial recovery permits. This regulatory change is seen as a significant modernization that could accelerate the development of critical mineral resources from the deep seabed.

feed.title: Kimco Realty Corporation Announces 2025 Dividend Tax Treatment
feed.summary: Kimco Realty Corporation has announced the tax treatment for its common stock and preferred stock dividend distributions for 2025. The company, a real estate investment trust (REIT), provided detailed allocations as they will be reported on Form 1099-DIV for both common shares and Preferred Series L and M. These details include the ex-dividend date, record date, payable date, and the breakdown of distributions into ordinary income, capital gains, and return of capital components.

feed.title: Price-Driven Insight from (AEFC) for Rule-Based Strategy
feed.summary: This article provides a price-driven insight for Aegon Funding Company Llc (NASDAQ: AEFC), highlighting a full alignment in neutral sentiment that favors a wait-and-see approach. It details exceptional risk-reward short setup and offers three institutional trading strategies tailored to different risk profiles. The analysis includes multi-timeframe signal analysis and AI-generated signals for informed decision-making.

feed.title: Pinnacle and Synovus Merger Completed, 2025 Net Income Reaches $746.7 Million
feed.summary: The merger between Pinnacle Financial Partners and Synovus was finalized on January 1, 2026, aiming to foster growth and improve client experience. Both companies showed strong pre-merger performance in 2025, with significant increases in EPS, loan and deposit growth, and non-interest revenue. Wall Street analysts maintain a generally positive outlook for Pinnacle Financial (PNFP) stock, with several firms initiating or raising price targets following the merger news.

feed.title: Brown & Brown declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.165 per share
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.165 per share, payable on February 11, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 4, 2026. The insurance brokerage firm has a 40-year history of consistent dividend payments and observed a 26.92% dividend growth over the last year. The announcement follows recent analyst coverage with varied ratings and price targets, acknowledging the company's strong market position and recent acquisition activities.

feed.title: Ally Financial originations rise 4.9%
feed.summary: Ally Financial's auto originations increased by 4.9% year-over-year in the fourth quarter to $10.8 billion, driven by improved credit performance and underwriting adjustments. Despite the annual rise, originations were down 7.7% quarter-over-quarter. The volume of auto finance applications also saw an 8.6% increase year-over-year, alongside a retail auto originated yield of 9.6%.

feed.title: Documents & Charters
feed.summary: This page from Fiserv, Inc. outlines the company's corporate governance documents and charters. It details the duties of the Board of Directors in upholding high standards, serving as fiduciaries for shareholders, and overseeing management, subject to periodic modifications. Key documents like Governance Guidelines, Committee Charters, Code of Conduct, and political contribution reports are listed.

feed.title: Company Profile
feed.summary: Fiserv, Inc. (NASDAQ: FISV) is a Fortune 500 company and a global leader in payments and financial technology. The company offers a wide range of services including account processing, digital banking, card services, payments, e-commerce, and the Clover point-of-sale system. Fiserv is recognized as a member of the S&P 500 Index and one of Fortune's World's Most Admired Companies.

feed.title: Ratios
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of Fiserv, Inc.'s financial ratios, covering valuation, profitability, efficiency, per-share data, growth, financial strength, and management effectiveness. It details key metrics such as P/E ratios, operating margins, revenue per share, and return on equity, presenting data for trailing twelve months (TTM), most recent quarter (MRQ), and fiscal year (FY).

feed.title: 0000798354-25-000171 | 10-Q
feed.summary: This article provides details about Fiserv, Inc.'s 10-Q SEC filing. The filing, dated October 30, 2025, covers the company's financial position up to September 30, 2025. It includes links to various formats of the document, including iXBRL, HTML, PDF, DOC, XLS, and XBRL files.

feed.title: The Best Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
feed.summary: This article identifies Coca-Cola, Realty Income, and Walmart as top dividend stocks suitable for long-term investors due to their consistent dividend growth and strong business models. Coca-Cola and Walmart are Dividend Kings with decades of annual increases, while Realty Income provides a stable monthly dividend from its extensive real estate portfolio. The author emphasizes diversification with such stable value and dividend stocks to protect portfolios during market volatility.

feed.title: Range Resources Corp expects to report total gain on derivatives of $32.8 million for three months ended December 31, 2025
feed.summary: Range Resources Corp anticipates reporting a total gain on derivatives of $32.8 million for the three-month period ending December 31, 2025. This financial expectation was published on MarketScreener. The company's stock, RRC, closed at $36.24 USD with a 3.81% increase for the day.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Announces Tax Characteristics of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust has released the income tax characteristics for its 2025 distributions paid to shareholders, which will be reported on Form 1099-DIV. This information is intended to assist banks, brokerage firms, and institutional investors in issuing accurate 1099 forms. The announcement details the record dates, payment dates, total distribution per share, and classification of dividends including ordinary taxable, qualified, long-term capital gain, and Section 199A dividends.

feed.title: How Truist’s Upgrade and Mixed Analyst Views Will Impact UDR (UDR) Investors
feed.summary: Truist Securities upgraded UDR's rating from Hold to Buy, signaling increased analyst confidence in the apartment REIT despite mixed overall Wall Street opinions. This upgrade, mirroring UBS's positive outlook, could influence sentiment and trading liquidity for UDR. Investors are encouraged to consider diverse perspectives, including UDR's debt profile and current valuation, as the company's investment narrative centers on durable earnings and a reliable income stream rather than rapid growth.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Announces Tax Characteristics of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT) has released the income tax characteristics for its 2025 distributions paid to shareholders, aiding banks and brokerage firms in issuing Form 1099-DIV. The announcement details the breakdown of ordinary taxable dividends, qualified dividends, long-term capital gain, and other specific gains across four payment dates in 2025. The company advises shareholders to consult their own tax advisors due to varying federal and state tax laws.

feed.title: Police investigating $15,000 Home Depot theft in Dickson City
feed.summary: Police in Lackawanna County are investigating a retail theft at a Home Depot in Dickson City involving over $15,000 worth of merchandise, which they believe is connected to a similar incident at a Stroudsburg Home Depot. Authorities are asking the public for assistance in identifying and locating the suspect, as retail theft cases of this magnitude often involve organized crime.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Announces Tax Characteristics of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust has announced the income tax characteristics for its 2025 distributions to shareholders, which will be reported on Form 1099-DIV. This information is provided to assist financial institutions in issuing 1099 forms to their account holders, detailing ordinary taxable dividends, qualified dividends, and long-term capital gains for each quarterly distribution. The company emphasizes that state and local tax treatment may differ from federal and advises shareholders to consult their tax advisors.

feed.title: Enterprises Ready To Scale AI Beyond Pilots, Says Wipro's Rishad Premji
feed.summary: Wipro Executive Chairman Rishad Premji believes 2026 will be a pivotal year for AI adoption, with companies moving beyond pilot projects to large-scale implementation. He emphasized the importance of strong data foundations and contextual depth for large language models. Premji also highlighted India's potential to build multilingual AI models and become a global leader in AI deployment at scale, leveraging its digital public infrastructure and engineering talent.

feed.title: OMFL ETF: Contrarian Factor Mix, Remains A Buy (BATS:OMFL)
feed.summary: The Invesco Russell 1000 Dynamic Multifactor ETF (OMFL) is a contrarian investment vehicle with a macro-centered multifactor strategy designed to recalibrate the Russell 1000. Despite recent underperformance against the S&P 500, the ETF's current portfolio offers a margin of safety against potential market shifts. The author maintains a "Buy" rating, citing the strategy's past success in navigating market changes and continued optimism about its unique approach.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $810,000 of ALLY FINANCIAL INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: ALLY FINANCIAL INC has disclosed $810,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, focusing on financial regulatory reform, consumer financial products, the Dodd-Frank Act, and taxation related to financial institutions. In the past six months, insider trading for ALLY stock shows one sale by Kathleen L. Patterson totaling over $1.1 million, and hedge fund activity indicates significant institutional interest with many firms adding shares, while analysts have issued multiple "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings with a median price target of $52.5.

feed.title: U-Haul Holding Company Schedules Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results Release and Investor Webcast
feed.summary: U-Haul Holding Company (UHAL) announced it will release its third-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. The company will then host an investor conference call and webcast on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. Arizona Time (10 a.m. ET) to discuss the results. An archived version of the webcast will be available for one year for those unable to attend the live event.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $30,000 of UNIVERSAL TECHNICAL INSTITUTE lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: UNIVERSAL TECHNICAL INSTITUTE (UTI) disclosed $30,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, focusing on "Job training" and "federal education funding." The article also details recent insider trading activity, with 8 insider purchases and no sales in the past six months, and hedge fund movements, showing a mixed sentiment among institutional investors. Analyst ratings include two recent "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings with a median price target of $36.0.

feed.title: Synovus announces earnings for the fourth quarter 2025
feed.summary: Synovus Financial Corp. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, ahead of its merger with Pinnacle Financial Partners, Inc. which closed on January 1, 2026. The company announced diluted EPS of $1.22 for Q4 2025 and $5.33 for the full year 2025, highlighting strong performance from both Synovus and Pinnacle amidst their pending merger. The report also detailed financial performance metrics, balance sheet data, and an outlook on the integration process of the two entities.

feed.title: Petroleo Brasileiro SA Petrobras Options Spot-On: On January 21st, 114.55K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.05 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: Petroleo Brasileiro SA Petrobras (PBR.US) experienced significant options trading activity on January 21st, with 114.55K contracts traded. Call options constituted a large majority at 83.33% of transactions. The open interest for PBR.US totaled 1.05 million contracts, representing 81.81% of its 30-day average. A notable trade involved a call option with a $14.00 strike price expiring on June 18th, 2026, generating $199.28K in turnover.

feed.title: Sands to Release Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS) announced it will release its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a conference call at approximately 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time to discuss these results. A webcast of the call will be accessible via Sands' investor relations website.

feed.title: Apollo Silver Closes First Tranche of $27.5 Million Private Placement Offering Including $2.355 Million Investment from Insiders
feed.summary: Apollo Silver has closed the first tranche of its upsized non-brokered private placement, raising $15 million. This tranche included a significant investment from major shareholder Eric Sprott ($12.5 million) and $2.355 million from company insiders. The proceeds will be used to advance the Calico Silver Project, support the Cinco de Mayo Silver Project, cover maintenance costs, and for general corporate purposes.

feed.title: Aptar Again Recognized with Prestigious ‘A’ Score on the CDP Climate Change Assessment
feed.summary: AptarGroup, Inc. has been recognized by the global environmental non-profit CDP with its prestigious "A List" score for climate change assessment for the second consecutive year. This recognition highlights Aptar's leadership in corporate environmental responsibility, including actions to cut emissions, mitigate climate risks, and further the low-carbon economy. The company has set science-based targets for emissions reductions and improved its risk and opportunities disclosures in line with TCFD recommendations.

feed.title: In J&J talc litigation, N.J. court-appointed official recommends allowing expert testimony
feed.summary: A court-appointed special master in New Jersey has recommended that plaintiffs in the Johnson & Johnson talc litigation be allowed to present expert testimony regarding the link between talc and ovarian cancer. This decision, affecting approximately 67,500 lawsuits, comes despite J&J's claims of no conclusive evidence and its intention to appeal. While J&J has won many cases, it has also faced several significant financial defeats in recent judgments.

feed.title: David Viniar (Goldman Sachs) sells $3.29 million in GS stock
feed.summary: David Viniar, a Director at Goldman Sachs Group Inc (NYSE:GS), sold 3,380 shares of company stock on January 16, 2026, totaling over $3.29 million. Despite these sales, Viniar still indirectly holds 173,693 shares. The article also notes recent positive analyst price target adjustments for Goldman Sachs and leadership changes within the company.

feed.title: Stride, Jabil, Benchmark, Knowles, and Connection Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Stride, Jabil, Benchmark, Knowles, and Connection surged after President Trump called off tariffs on European allies, cooling fears of a transatlantic trade war. This news led to a broad market rally, with technology stocks like Nvidia and AMD leading the recovery, and the Nasdaq Composite and S&P 500 reversing recent losses. The market's positive reaction was also supported by a stabilization in bond yields, creating a more favorable environment for equity valuations.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $360,000 of AMERICAN ELECTRIC POWER COMPANY INC. AND AFFILIATED CORPORATIONS lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: AMERICAN ELECTRIC POWER COMPANY INC. AND AFFILIATED CORPORATIONS disclosed $360,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, covering issues such as the "FY26 National Defense Authorization Act," infrastructure, cybersecurity, and energy regulations. The article also details recent congressional and insider trading activity in AEP stock, significant hedge fund movements, and current analyst ratings and price targets for the company.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs issues $16 billion in new notes with maturities through 2047
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has announced the issuance of $16 billion in new debt securities with maturities ranging from 2029 to 2047, according to a press release and SEC filing. These new offerings include various fixed/floating rate and floating rate notes. This move follows recent analyst price target increases for Goldman Sachs and ongoing leadership changes within its global credit business.

feed.title: Regions Financial Corp (RF.PR.C) Declares Consistent Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp's preferred stock (RF.PR.C) is maintaining its quarterly dividend of $0.3562 per share, equating to a 5.78% forward yield. Despite a recent stock decline following Q4 results, the company projects net interest income growth of 2.5% to 4% for 2026 and demonstrates strong financial health with a Piotroski F-Score of 9. However, valuation metrics suggest the stock may be modestly overvalued, and its dividend yield is near a 2-year low.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Andrew D'Amico Sells 200 Shares of Vicor Corp (VICR)
feed.summary: Andrew D'Amico, a Director at Vicor Corp (VICR), sold 200 shares of the company on January 20, 2026, and now owns no shares. Over the past year, D'Amico has sold 37,588 shares with no purchases, contributing to a total of 45 insider sells for Vicor Corp. The stock, valued at $155 per share on the day of the sale, is considered significantly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 2.82.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Stock Price Up 1.5% on Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) saw its stock price increase by 1.5% after TD Cowen raised its price target to $120, though maintaining a "hold" rating. This upgrade, along with positive clinical data for its personalized mRNA vaccine and a partnership for an Ebola vaccine, contributed to improved analyst sentiment despite a recent earnings per share miss. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.85, offering an annualized yield of approximately 3.1%.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Shares Up 2.1% Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: International Business Machines (IBM) shares rose 2.1% after JPMorgan Chase & Co. increased its price target from $290 to $312, maintaining a "neutral" rating. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with a target of $306.86. IBM is increasingly being viewed as an AI growth company, driven by its watsonx platform and new partnerships, with its upcoming Q4 earnings on January 28th being a significant catalyst.

feed.title: Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) Trading Down 2.3% After Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) shares dropped 2.3% after Rothschild & Co Redburn downgraded the stock, lowering its price target from $500 to $450 while maintaining a neutral rating. Despite this, the consensus among analysts remains a "Buy" with an average price target of $624.08, driven by momentum in AI and cloud partnerships. Insider selling has also been noted, with CEO Judson Althoff selling 12,750 shares and total insider sales reaching 54,100 shares over the past 90 days.

feed.title: How The Evolving Price Target Is Rewriting The Story For KeyCorp (KEY)
feed.summary: The article discusses how the shifting price target for KeyCorp (KEY) reflects analysts' reassessments of the bank's earnings mix, balance sheet priorities, and overall risk-reward profile, aligning with evolving market expectations for regional banks. Investors are encouraged to consider how these changes resonate with their own risk tolerance and investment horizons rather than focusing solely on the headline price. Simply Wall St's "Narratives" feature is highlighted as a tool to track how news and financial updates influence a stock's fair value.

feed.title: Regions taps Global Payments' Worldpay to enhance business payment services
feed.summary: Regions Bank has partnered with Worldpay, a Global Payments company, to provide its business banking customers with advanced payment tools and real-time data insights. This collaboration aims to enhance payment services for businesses banking with Regions.

feed.title: Dexcom Reports 22% Revenue Growth to $1.2 Billion in 2024 Amidst Challenges
feed.summary: Dexcom reported strong Q3 2024 revenue growth of 22% year-over-year, reaching $1.2 billion, despite a Class 1 recall for some G7 receivers. The company expanded its customer base to nearly 2.9 million and sees significant potential in the 4.5 million diabetes patients yet to adopt CGM technology, especially with the introduction of its new Stelo product for non-insulin users. Wall Street analysts maintain a positive outlook for DXCM, with an average 1-year price target of $84.81.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group Named to Fortune’s World’s Most Admired Companies List for 2026: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has been included in Fortune’s World’s Most Admired Companies 2026 list, recognizing its leadership in the global vacation industry. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to innovation, excellent guest experiences, and strategic growth across its brands, including Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea. The recognition also underscores Royal Caribbean Group’s dedication to setting new standards through initiatives like its Icon Class ships, expanding private destinations, and innovative loyalty programs.

feed.title: Textron E-Z-GO LLC Launches New Pace Technology Onyx™ In-Vehicle Solution
feed.summary: Textron E-Z-GO LLC has launched Onyx™, a new in-vehicle solution for its Pace Technology® platform, available on E-Z-GO® and Cushman® ELiTE series vehicles. Onyx features an ultrawide high-definition screen and pinpoint GPS positioning, including optional real-time kinematic (RTK) positioning for enhanced accuracy. This technology aims to improve the on-course experience for golfers with detailed information and management capabilities for course operators, such as geofencing and real-time vehicle tracking.

feed.title: Starbucks Settles COBRA Suit From Ex-Worker's Spouse
feed.summary: Starbucks has reached a settlement in a proposed class action lawsuit concerning alleged failures in its post-employment medical insurance notices. The suit, filed in Florida federal court, involved employee health plan participants and beneficiaries who claimed the coffee retailer fell short on its COBRA obligations.
